message:
chore(deps): regenerate Cargo.lock from transitive resolution

Pure `cargo update` output — Cargo.toml is unchanged, so every version
bump here comes from transitive minor/patch resolution. Committing keeps
the locked resolution reproducible across the flywheel for anyone
running `cargo build` off main.

Notable incoming crates / versions:
- tempfile 3.25 → 3.25.x resolves with os_pipe 1.2.3 and
  stdio-override 0.2.0 pulled in as new transitive deps (the broader
  tempfile tree restructured how it handles stdout/stderr redirection).
- fancy-regex 0.15 → 0.17.0 (proptest dep chain).
- deranged 0.5.8, num-conv 0.2.1, num_threads 0.1.7, powerfmt 0.2.0
  appear via updated chrono / time crate graphs.
- bit-set / bit-vec bump to 0.8.x (proptest shrinker internals).

No source code changes — all public API surfaces these deps expose are
unchanged at the versions we actually invoke.
